# CrownyCode — Mwanzo wa Haraka

## Sakinisha
```bash
bash install.sh
```

## Tengeneza Msimbo wa Kwanza
```bash
crownycode gen "tengeneza seva ya wavuti" -t rust
crownycode gen "tengeneza kazi ya kupanga" -t python -o sort.py
```

## Tazama Maelezo ya Msimbo
```bash
crownycode gen "tengeneza seva ya wavuti" -t rust --explain
```

## Ombi la Muundo
```bash
crownycode gen "soma faili na uhifadhi kwenye database" -t rust
```

## Tazama Nia Zinazopatikana
```bash
crownycode intents
```

## Mafunzo
```bash
crownycode tutorial
```
